visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a bright graphic intro featuring a large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and a cartoon avatar of Wreck-It Ralph in the upper left. Thick, colorful Chinese text overlays the scene against a background of green and white plush textures. (2) A rapid series of shots follows, each showcasing a different product inside a warehouse store. A person's hand is seen holding a green F1 toy car. Subsequent shots feature bulk stacks of Kleenex toilet paper, Fernleaf milk powder, and various snacks like nuts and nougat. The camera is steady, focusing on the product packaging. (3) The sequence continues through dozens of products: chocolate, crackers, jerky, pet food, and household staples. Each scene is brightly lit by overhead warehouse lights. The background consistently shows industrial shelving and other shoppers' blurred movements. (4) The final segment displays refrigerated items like shrimp, curry, and frozen meals. The framing is consistent, with a central focus on the product and price labels. The video concludes with a quick succession of health supplements and fish oil bottles.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 比爾特派員. [Variety]: 好市多. 每週特價速報. 04/07~04/13 記得追蹤我們. (2) [Slogan]: F1兒童電動玩具車. [Subtitle]: 原價6599 -1400 特價5199. (3) [Slogan]: 舒潔 三層抽取式衛生紙. [Subtitle]: 原價419 -84 特價335. (4) [Slogan]: 豐力富 紐西蘭頂級純濃奶粉. [Subtitle]: 原價769 -154 特價615. (5) [Slogan]: 萬歲牌 優格風味綜合堅果乾. [Subtitle]: 原價469 -95 特價374. (6) [Slogan]: 櫻桃爺爺 經典原味牛軋糖. [Subtitle]: 原價399 -80 特價319. (7) [Slogan]: HERSHEY'S 綜合KISSES巧克力. [Subtitle]: 原價379 -80 特價299. (8) [Slogan]: 健司 金黃起司餅乾. [Subtitle]: 原價359 -75 特價284. (9) [Slogan]: 美珍香 麻辣杰奇豬肉乾. [Subtitle]: 原價469 -292 特價357. 限時特價桃園南崁店. (10) [Slogan]: 西莎 成犬低脂雞肉蒸鮮包. [Subtitle]: 原價329 -70 特價259. (11) [Slogan]: KID-O 奶油三明治家庭號. [Subtitle]: 原價329 -65 特價264. (12) [Slogan]: OREO 迷你夾心餅乾分享組. [Subtitle]: 原價339 -80 特價259. (13) [Slogan]: DORAEMON 遙控時光機. [Subtitle]: 原價799 -180 特價619. (14) [Slogan]: CALVIN KLEIN 男棉質彈性內褲 四入組 剩S號. [Subtitle]: 原價979 -282 特價697. (15) [Slogan]: 吳寶春 黑糖核桃吐司. [Subtitle]: 原價139 -39 特價100. (16) [Slogan]: CROWN 穀物麥香餅乾. [Subtitle]: 原價359 -74 特價285.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One person's hands are visible interacting with products; no full bodies or faces are shown.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Interior of a large warehouse retail store with high ceilings, industrial lighting, and tall metal shelves packed with diverse products in bulk packaging.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, high-tempo pop music track characterized by bright synth textures and a steady beat. A male narrator delivers an energetic introduction in Mandarin with a clear, projected tone. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect triggers a transition to a repetitive, rapid-fire sequence. The narrator calls out product names in sync with the visual cuts, speaking at a very high rate with enthusiastic inflection. (3) Each new product is introduced by a crisp 'pop' SFX. The background music remains continuous, maintaining a joyful major-key feel. The narrator's pitch is slightly elevated to convey excitement about the discounts. (4) The sequence continues for over a minute, maintaining high vocal density and consistent SFX triggers for every edit. The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic call to follow the channel, as the music fades out abruptly with the last word.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Rapid Product Catalog -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly efficient and energetic weekly summary of discounted items at Costco, aimed at local shoppers in Taiwan. The video uses high information density and excitement to encourage viewers to visit the store and follow the creator for future updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is entirely dedicated to showcasing specific discounted products, their original prices, and the current savings at a specific retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: An archetype of the social media 'bargain-hunter' genre, using hyper-fast editing and high-arousal vocal delivery to maximize retention.
